title: DHEA Sulfate Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
s. Your adrenal glands help control your heart rate, blood pressure, and other body functions. They make different types of hormones Â you need to stay healthy. This includes cortisol, a hormone that helps with your immune system , and DHEAS, a steroid hormone.
DHEAS is a type of androgen (male sex hormone), but it's found in both men and women. Smaller amounts of DHEAS are made in the testicles and ovaries.
DHEAS plays an important role in making the male sex hormone testosterone and the female sex hormone estrogen. DHEAS helps with the development of male sexual characteristics at puberty Â and reproduction for both sexes. Your DHEAS levels peak around puberty and then get lower as you age.
If your DHEAS levels are not normal, it may mean there is a problem with your adrenal glands Â or sex hormones (estrogen or testosterone).
Other names: DHEAS, DHEA-S, DHEA, DHEA-SO4, dehydroepiandrosterone sulfate
What is it used for? 
A DHEA sulfate (DHEAS) test is most often used to:
Find out if your adrenal glands are working well 
Diagnose tumors of the adrenal glands 
Diagnose disorders of the testicles Â or ovaries 
Find out the cause of early or late puberty in boys 
Look for the cause of the development of masculine features in women and girls, including excess body and facial hair growth and deepening of voice 
A DHEAS test is often done along with other sex hormone tests. These i
